introSection: Chupy Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Brazilian Park Washuzan Highland in Kurashiki, Okayama, Japan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: At some point prior to 2005, the trains were replaced.

fullText:
Chupy Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Brazilian Park Washuzan Highland in Kurashiki, Okayama, Japan.



At some point prior to 2005, the trains were replaced.
